jsonLd.title: Zerodha is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Zerodha in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Zerodha:
Zerodha is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zerodha!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
